description.en: View detailed information about a specific NFT from a MultiversX collection. Shows the NFT image, name, collection, attributes, royalties, and creator.
description.de: Zeige detaillierte Informationen zu einem bestimmten NFT aus einer MultiversX-Kollektion. Zeigt NFT-Bild, Name, Kollektion, Attribute, Royalties und Ersteller.
description.es: View detailed information about a specific NFT from a MultiversX collection. Shows the NFT image, name, collection, attributes, royalties, and creator.
description.fr: View detailed information about a specific NFT from a MultiversX collection. Shows the NFT image, name, collection, attributes, royalties, and creator.
description.ro: View detailed information about a specific NFT from a MultiversX collection. Shows the NFT image, name, collection, attributes, royalties, and creator.
description.it: View detailed information about a specific NFT from a MultiversX collection. Shows the NFT image, name, collection, attributes, royalties, and creator.

description.en: The full NFT identifier including nonce (e.g. 'MYNFT-a1b2c3-01').
